response: A Flaming beverage and a Gin and tonic share the commonality of containing high-proof alcohol, which may be either an integral part of the drink or floated as a thin layer across the top. Both beverages are mixed drinks that include a carbonated beverage (tonic water) and a spirit (gin or tequila), and they are often served with garnishes such as lime wedges. The Flaming beverage specifically involves the ignition of the alcohol before consumption, while the Gin and tonic typically involves the addition of a splash of whiskey, but both beverages are characterized by their use of alcohol as a key component.
